name: Product Roadmap
description: A Now / Next / Later product roadmap that goes from idea to shipped, with a timeline view for stakeholders and a board for the product team's day-to-day.

teams.name: Product
teams.description: Owns the product roadmap, discovery, and prioritization.

workflowStates.name: Exploring
workflowStates.description: In discovery — user research, feasibility, sizing.

workflowStates.name: Planned
workflowStates.description: Validated and scheduled onto the roadmap.

issueTemplates.title: Launch mobile app v2
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
Full rewrite of the mobile app on the new design system, with offline support.

### Why
Mobile NPS has lagged web by 20 points for two quarters.

### Success metric
Mobile WAU/MAU parity with web within 2 quarters of launch.

issueTemplates.title: Add SSO (SAML + SCIM) for enterprise
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Blocking three enterprise deals worth $180k ARR combined. Needs SAML login + SCIM provisioning.

issueTemplates.title: Redesign onboarding flow
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Current activation rate is 22% Day-7. Hypothesis: too many steps before first value. Test a 3-step version.

issueTemplates.title: Public API v1
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: REST API with API keys, rate limiting, and OpenAPI docs. Table stakes for the integrations ecosystem.

issueTemplates.title: AI-assisted search across issues and docs
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Natural-language search over the workspace using embeddings. Requires the vector index work to land first.

issueTemplates.title: Slack-native issue creation
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Create and update issues from a Slack shortcut/slash command without leaving Slack.

issueTemplates.title: Custom fields for issues
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Workspace-defined fields (text/number/select/date) shown on the issue detail and usable in filters/views.

views.name: Roadmap Timeline
views.description: Now / Next / Later swimlanes across the quarter.

views.name: Shipped This Quarter
views.description: A running changelog input — everything that hit "Shipped".
